title: Stundenplan entlädt sich bei jedem neu öffnen der App
author: e30301
body:
### Problem Statement

Es wäre toll, wenn der Stundenplan im zustand, wie er beim letzten laden war, auf dem Telefon gespeichert werden würde, damit man nicht immer eine Internetverbindung braucht, um den Stundenplan anzusehen.

### Solution Ideas

_No response_

title: Ability to view and download attachments/files for direct messages
author: Dominik917
body:
### Steps to Reproduce

Open a message that contains file attachments.

### Expected Result

The files should be shown in the message and be downloadable.

### Actual Result

Only the message is shown, but not the attachments.

### Android Version

Android 16

### BetterUntis Version

Version 5.0.0-beta04

### Installation Source

F-Droid

### Additional information

It is also not possible to reply or write messages, as you can see in the Info Center or in the messages you received.

title: Publish signing fingerprint hash for GitHub release
author: Eiernase
body:
### Problem Statement

This can be used to verify the APK using AppVerifier when installing through Obtainium. Currently there is no way to verify its authenticity.

### Solution Ideas

Please publish the hash of the fingerprint used to sign the GitHub release.

title: Apply system proxy
author: RandomModderJDK
body:
### Problem Statement

I would like to use this wonderful replacement app in my schools wifi. My school requires to use a HTTP proxy to access internet.
For that the app would need to apply these proxy settings as this is not the default behaviour.

### Solution Ideas

For actually implementing a solution I see two ways:
1. Use the HTTP_PROXY system property -> this doesn't support PAC proxies, because the settings are applied when they are resolved and are not static
2. So my final proposal is to use the first approach and a BroadcastReceiver that listens for proxy updates. I provided an example for flutter here:
https://github.com/RandomModderJDK/native_flutter_proxy/blob/a1e3994feeda1057615d859ffe1d6d110f77c8e3/android/src/main/kotlin/com/victorblaess/native_flutter_proxy/FlutterProxyPlugin.kt

title: Cache Timetable
author: heschy2
body:
### Problem Statement

My school is rather weird with Internet, the details of that are irrelevant, my point is: I sometimes dont have Internet when I try to access my timetable.

If I open the App before School I can see my tinetable. If I open the App at school, the timetable is empty and due to aforementioned weirdness, it cannot be downloaded. This happens even if the timetable was already viewed before school.

### Solution Ideas

For such situations I would welcome if the timetable got cached once retrieved and didnt need to be retrieved everytime I open the app.

I am pretty sure an older version if the app did this (before it stopped working entirely, so just going back id not an option). That would also explain the currently useless "Last refreshed: ..." indicator.

If the app already does this, this is obviously not a feature request but a bug report, so here are some details on my system:

```
App Version: 5.0.0-beta4 (29198884)
Android Version: Android 15
Phone: Fairphone 5 (FP5)
OS Version: Calyx OS 6.10.20 (security is risk, yes, I am aware)
Google Play: MicroG is installed but disabled
```

title: "Eigener Stundenplan" is empty
author: comdoxx
body:
### Steps to Reproduce

I recently changed my phone and didn't care. Now I wanted to use BetterUntis again and thus I upgraded to 5.0.0b4, threw away the old credentials and started from scratch and logged in

### Expected Result

"Eigener Stundenplan" shows up.

### Actual Result

However, the "Eigener Stundenplan" keeps empty. If - on the other hand - I switch over to "Klassen" and pick the correct one, everything is fine. So, this is not a login issue and I have no alerts at all.

### Android Version

Android 16

### BetterUntis Version

5.0.0b4

### Installation Source

GitHub Release

### Additional information

_No response_

title: line breaking
author: myxvcx
body: ### Problem Statement I would really like a feature that it splitts up the name of a lessen into two lines if it is to long. I imagine it something like this. ### Solution Ideas _No response_

title: Info center broken (announcements incomplete)
author: novamax
body:
### Steps to Reproduce

Info center shows only one incomplete line in bold (e.g. "AGs fallen aus..." (some 30 characters - almost complete heading). Second line reads "<div>Abwesend}: ..." (again some 30 characters only of several lines of announcements).

Below, there is a separate field with an info sign in a circle, followed by "Unbekannter Fehler", and below "Unauthorized". For reference:I use a profile with anonymous login.

### Expected Result

Info center should show complete comments over several lines (like Untis mobile or webUntis does).

### Actual Result

As described above. I cannot click on these announcements to open them or the like, but the `<div>` part suggests there is some mixup.

### Android Version

Android 16 (GraphenOS)

### BetterUntis Version

5.0.0-beta04 (29198884)

### Installation Source

F-Droid

### Additional information

_No response_

title: Multiple Children
author: retr0virus
body:
### Problem Statement

It seems not to be possible (or I didn't find the option) to see multiple children in your app. In the original one I (as a parent) can select between all my children and see their timetables, their absences and so on.
When I look in the absences in your app, I see all the times of my children mixed but without any hint, which one is for which of my children.
In your app I can add multiple time tables but again I don't see which one is related to which of my children.

### Solution Ideas

Please at least add the info (e.g. to the absences), to which pupil the displayed information is related.
Maybe even add a global filter for them, similar to the original app.

title: Custom lesson length
author: noobproxmox
body:
### Problem Statement

I currently have the problem that the displayed lesson length no longer corresponds to the lesson length in reality. At our school, a lesson lasts only 45 minutes. In addition, the break times specified by my school are not applied.
(I don't think this is a bug, so I'm submitting a feature request.) 


### Solution Ideas

The transfer of predefined lesson lengths, breaks, and all resulting predetermined items on the timeline from the school.

title: Excluding lessons with a button.
author: Hirowoko
body:
### Problem Statement

I can't see the teachers i have (seems like a problem with the API, an issue was created by someone). And thats the only thing i can distinguish my lesson with others'.

### Solution Ideas

Adding a button to hide certain lessons, so only my lessons are shown.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1536c2cd-cdd2-408a-9462-fa3483323dc0)

title: Solution Proposal for API shutdown in the end of 2025
author: PythonTilk
body: According to the api docs of WebUntis, api version v1 and v2 will shutdown in the end of 2025. v3 requires a shared token for every school, that only the IT department of every school can acquire. I stumbled upon this since im currently trying to recreate BetterUntis for IOS. Do you guys have any solutions for this problem?

title: The app crashs after changing an element color
author: Marco-9456
body:
### Steps to Reproduce

Ich habe einen Fehler gefunden, bei dem die App abstürzt, wenn man versucht, die Farbe für eine element z.B eine Klassenarbeit zu ändern. Hier sind die Schritte, um ihn zu reproduzieren:
1. ​In den Einstellungen die Standardfarbe für Klassenarbeiten von Gelb auf eine beliebige Farbe ändern und setze den slider auf die Mitte.
​2. Zur Kalenderwoche scrollen, in der die Klassenarbeit stattfindet.

​Die App stürzt ab, sobald man versucht, auf die Woche zuzugreifen.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6c688ebd-6ed8-4d00-aeee-7fbe8f4827ce)

### Expected Result

Das die app app nicht abstürzt und sich die Farbe ändert.

### Actual Result

Die app ist abgestürzt.

### Android Version

Android 12

### BetterUntis Version

5.0.0-beta04

### Installation Source

GitHub Release

### Additional information

_No response_

Would it be possible to add such a feature to BetterUntis?
With best regards,
MoLP5776
